MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RUBY BURKE, MFC Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.
APPEARANCES: Albert J. Garcia, Esq., 510-848-5190, Law Offices of Albert J. Garcia for Petitioner and Moving Party; Christina Thomas, Esq., 213-897-2557 Deputy Attorney General for Respondent and Opposing Party.
